message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLSequenceDiagram {
    participantStyle = rectangle
    participantStyle.color = #f0f0f0
    participantStyle.border = 1px solid #ccc
    participantStyle.border-radius = 4px
    participantStyle.background-color = #e0e0e0
}

participant "Authenticated User" as User1
participant "Authenticated User" as User2
participant ":System" as System

User1 -> System: 1 Asks to associate a human resource (user) to a project
System -- User1: 2 Search for the Data
User1 -> System: 3 Asks for Project List
System -- User1: 4 Shows Project List
User1 -> System: 5 Asks for System User List
System -- User1: 6 Shows System User List
User1 -> System: 7 Types data (email, projectCode, startDate, endDate, costPerHour, percentageOfAllocation)
System -- User1: 8 Shows Information Success

@enduml
